productDisplayName: Maxima Ssteele Men Blue Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case Dial style: Blue dial with silver hands Strap style: Stainless steel bracelet style strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 3 hour mark, minute marks on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
